title: SCBE Dense-Bundle SFT — coding + chemistry
subtitle: 3,370 SFT records with parallel binary/hex/base64/ternary + intent overlay
description:
## What this is

3,370 supervised fine-tuning records, each augmented with a `dense_bundle` field that carries **five parallel encodings of the user-turn payload**: binary, hex, base64, balanced-ternary (all lossless byte views), plus an intent-polarity overlay (one trit per byte: +1 / 0 / -1).

Derived from the source SFT lanes in `issacizrealdavis/scbe-coding-agent-stage6-repair-v7` via `scripts/encoding/augment_sft_with_dense_bundle.py` in the [SCBE-AETHERMOORE repo](https://github.com/issdandavis/SCBE-AETHERMOORE).

## What the bundle adds per record

```json
{
  "dense_bundle": {
    "target": "user",
    "default_view": "hex",
    "route_lane": "binary_analysis",
    "intent_profile": {"neg": 0.006, "zero": 0.0, "pos": 0.994},
    "byte_length": 500,
    "density_ratio": 16.38,
    "views": {
      "hex":     "4576616c75617465...",
      "binary":  "01000101011101100110000101101100...",
      "base64":  "RXZhbHVhdGUgdGhpcyBhZ2VudGljLi4u",
      "ternary": "1TT1011T11T11TTT000000T101101T01..."
    },
    "intent": [1, 1, 1, 1, ...]
  }
}
```

All four byte views round-trip back to the same payload bytes. The intent overlay is parallel signal (same code, different purpose) — the bit/float/trit theory of training-pair density.

## Lanes

| Lane | Records (train + eval) |
|---|---:|
| Chemistry verification (primary + v2 + adapter) | 2,201 |
| Coding-agent approval v3 (12-axis + marker variant) | 501 |
| Atomic-workflow stage 6 repair | 378 |
| Research bridge (source-grounded) | 138 |
| Operator agent-bus extraction | 84 |
| Governance security boundary | 101 |
| Stage 5 command harmony | 44 |

## Use cases

- **Cross-view consistency training** — same answer regardless of whether input is shown as text, hex, or base64
- **Intent-layer training** — route on the per-byte polarity signal
- **Bus dispatch** — every record carries a `route_lane` hint (binary_analysis / governance_intent / transport_opaque / text_default) that the SCBE swarm router uses for lane selection

## Format

OpenAI chat (`{messages: [{role, content}]}`), one JSON object per line. The `dense_bundle` field is a top-level key alongside `messages`.

## License

MIT (per the SCBE-AETHERMOORE repo's MIT/Apache-2.0 dual license). No PII, no secrets, no live API keys.

## Source

https://github.com/issdandavis/SCBE-AETHERMOORE
